mapper.insert: INSERT INTO image(image_no, image_title, image_category) VALUES (seq_image_no.nextVal, #{image_title}, #{image_category})
mapper.update: UPDATE image SET image_title=#{new_image_title} WHERE image_no=(SELECT image_no FROM users WHERE user_no=#{user_no})
UPDATE reply SET image_no = NULL WHERE reply_no = #{reply_no} AND writer_no = #{user_no}
UPDATE task SET image_no = NULL WHERE space_key = #{space_key} AND task_no = #{task_no} AND creator_no = #{user_no}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM image WHERE image_no IN(SELECT image_no FROM users WHERE user_no = #{quit_user_no})
